stories.title: Product description input + image upload UI
stories.description: Add a new tab or page with a product description textarea and image upload in the top-left corner
acceptanceCriteria: A textarea input exists for product description
An image upload button exists in the top-left of the input area
Uploaded image previews inline next to the textarea
A '生成创意' submit button triggers the generation flow

stories.title: Backend API endpoint for creative rewrite generation
stories.description: Create a POST /api/creative-rewrite endpoint that accepts product description + optional image, calls the LLM to generate creative angles then prompts
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/creative-rewrite endpoint exists and accepts multipart/form-data with 'description' and optional 'image' fields
LLM is called with a system prompt that generates 3-5 creative angles in the specified format (Hook, Concept, Why it fits)
LLM is called a second time per angle to generate the final video prompt in the specified format ([Style], [Prose], [Cinematography], [Lighting], [Actions], [Audio])
Response JSON contains array of {angle: {title, hook, concept, why}, prompt: string}
Endpoint handles errors gracefully and returns 500 with message on failure

stories.title: Creative results display UI
stories.description: Display generated creative angles and prompts in a clear, scannable layout
acceptanceCriteria: Each creative angle renders as a numbered card with title, Hook, Concept, Why it fits sections
Each card has an expandable/collapsible section showing the final video prompt
The prompt section has a copy-to-clipboard button
Cards are visually distinct with color coding per angle
Loading state shown while generation is in progress
